Home

Contact Us Page

The purpose of a contact page is to provide visitors with a way to get in touch with your business, ask questions, provide feedback, or request assistance.

Live Page: mobadran.github.io/contact-us
Repository: github.com/mobadran/contact-us

Social Media Dashboard

A tool that aggregates your crucial social media metrics across networks to quickly measure the performance of your posts/campaigns, customer care interactions and community engagement.

Live Page: mobadran.github.io/social-media-dashboard
Repository: github.com/mobadran/social-media-dashboard

The Little Taco Shop

A website for the Little Taco Shop

Live Page: mobadran.github.io/taco-shop
Repository: github.com/mobadran/taco-shop

Age Calculator

The Age Calculator is a simple yet powerful tool that allows users to quickly determine their age based on their birthdate.

Live Page: mobadran.github.io/age-calculator
Repository: github.com/mobadran/age-calculator

Repayment Calculator

The Repayment Calculator can be used to find the repayment amount or length of debts, such as credit cards, mortgages, auto loans, and personal loans.

Live Page: mobadran.github.io/repayment
Repository: github.com/mobadran/repayment
